attacking_style: Premature attacks on summit finishes, going too early before the final kick. Shows eagerness but poor timing judgment on final climbs, typically jumping before the optimal 1-2km window.
team_tactics: Limited data, but appears to have support for good positioning entering finals. Team gets him into contention but execution of final move is individual and mistimed.
terrain_preference: Can handle summit finishes and gets into contention on climbs, but best suited to longer sustained efforts rather than punchy kick finishes. Exposed on stages requiring explosive final accelerations.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing kick when countered after early moves. Tactical immaturity in reading when to commit on summit finishes, consistently fading after premature attacks.
key_patterns: Attacks too early on summit finishes, both observed instances show premature acceleration.
Fades when countered by riders with superior finishing kick (Hermans, 2 instances).
Good positioning entering finals but poor execution in timing final effort.
Immature race-reading on climbs, unable to judge optimal attack timing.
form_trajectory: unknown: only 2017 data available, showing tactical inexperience but also ability to be in contention
